mapper.insert: insert ignore into photo_like(photo_id, user_id, create_time) values (#{photoId}, #{userId}, now())
mapper.select: select count(*) from photo_like where photo_id = #{photoId}
select count(*) from photo_like where photo_id = #{photoId} and user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: insert ignore into photo_favorite(photo_id, user_id, create_time) values (#{photoId}, #{userId}, now())
mapper.select: select count(*) from photo_favorite where photo_id = #{photoId}
select count(*) from photo_favorite where photo_id = #{photoId} and user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: insert into photo_comment(photo_id, user_id, content, create_time) values (#{photoId}, #{userId}, #{content}, now())
mapper.select: select c.id, c.photo_id, c.user_id, u.username, c.content, c.create_time from photo_comment c join user_account u on u.id = c.user_id where c.photo_id = #{photoId} order by c.create_time desc
